---
title: "AFLIBER v2"
---

### Publication
A paper will be submitted soon.

### Authors
The new paper has been coauthored by data curators, namely: \ 

Ignacio Ramos-Gutiérrez, Carmen Acedo, Estrella Alfaro-Saiz, 
Montserrat Arista, Juan Arroyo, Moisès Guardiola,
Pedro Jiménez-Mejías, Rubén G. Mateo, Gonzalo Mateo,
Javier Peralta, Andrés V. Pérez-Latorre, Carlos Romero-Zarco,
Llorenç Sáez, Carlos Salazar-Mendías, Lluís Serra-Laliga, 
Juan Carlos Moreno-Saiz

### Data

The updated dataset incorporates 1,942,750 occurrences (from a total of 3,129,863 distributional records) for 6,471 native taxa with a 10 x 10 km resolution.

Access the updated version data here: [Dryad Digital Repository](https://doi.org/10.5061/dryad.gmsbcc2kv)
